---
name: github-issue-management
description: Manage GitHub Issues for project and product management workflows. Search for existing issues, create new issues for tasks/epics/user stories, update status and comments, link related issues, and close completed work. Use for automating project tracking.
license: MIT
---

# GitHub Issue Management Skill

- Search for existing issues before creating new ones.
- Create issues for new tasks, epics, or user stories.
- Update issues with status, comments, and links to PRs.
- Close issues when tasks are completed.

# Notes

- Epics should be labeled with `epic` and user stories with `user-story`.
- Use GitHub's issue linking to connect related issues (e.g., link user stories to their parent epic as sub-issues).
- Regularly review and update issues to reflect the current status of tasks.
